stemHtml: In which of the areas below does the intertropical convergence zone (ITCZ) have a significant impact?

options.a: The Atlantic Ocean, between latitudes 10°N and 30°N, depending on the time of year.
options.b: Western Africa, at a latitude of 25°N in July.
options.c: Western Africa, where it is situated between the 10°N and 30°N parallels, during the winter months.
options.d: Western Africa between 10°N and 20°N and the northern coasts of the Arabian Sea in July.
